overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a dark, decaying apartment building. The character uses a flashlight to navigate through rooms, hallways, and stairwells with atmospheric lighting and detailed environmental decay. The sequence progresses from a tiled entry room through an apartment interior, reception area, and upstairs to darker corridors where the character draws a handgun.

scene_state.functional_zone: tiled entry room with blackboard and fire safety equipment

events.description: character moves from white tiled room through doorway into darker kitchen area
entering dark apartment interior with only flashlight and television glow illuminating the space

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a white tiled utility room and entering a decaying apartment through a connecting doorway

entered.detail: large dark chalkboard with white writing covering the left wall of the entry room
red fire safety unit mounted on the wall near the exit doorway
white ceramic tile covering the walls of the entry room
blue kitchen cabinetry visible through the connecting doorway
old CRT television displaying bright static in the dark apartment room
wooden table with chairs positioned in the center of the living area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a white tiled utility room with a blackboard and fire extinguisher. The character walks through a doorway into a dark, decaying apartment where a television glows with static. The flashlight illuminates furniture covered in dust sheets as the character explores the living space.

scene_state.functional_zone: decayed apartment living room transitioning to building reception area

events.description: exiting the apartment into a connecting hallway with a reception desk visible ahead
passing the reception desk and entering a corridor with a phone booth

agents.ego_description: moving past the static-filled television and through the apartment, then proceeding down a hallway past a reception desk and phone booth

entered.detail: large wooden counter with glass partitions typical of an apartment building lobby
enclosed payphone booth with glass panels and metal frame against the wall
wooden waiting bench positioned against the left wall of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character exits the apartment into a hallway, passing a reception desk and a phone booth. The environment shows signs of decay with peeling paint and dim lighting. The character continues through the building's interior corridors, moving away from the residential area toward the stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell with overgrown vegetation and debris

events.description: beginning ascent of concrete stairwell with metal handrails
natural moonlight filters through a window covered in climbing vines

agents.ego_description: climbing a decaying stairwell while flashlight illuminates debris and vegetation growing through the window

entered.detail: concrete staircase with metal handrails leading upward between floors
large window heavily overgrown with green ivy and vegetation allowing some exterior light
rubble and broken concrete scattered on the stair landing

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a dark corridor and enters a stairwell. As they ascend the concrete stairs, natural light filters through a window heavily overgrown with vines. Debris litters the steps, indicating the building's state of decay. The character continues upward to the next floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor corridors with damaged walls and doorways

events.description: entering upper floor hallway with bathroom entrance visible to the left

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow upper floor corridors, passing doorways and wall fixtures while sweeping the flashlight across the walls

entered.detail: open doorway revealing orange-tiled bathroom interior
multiple closed doors lining the hallway with room numbers visible
damaged ceiling fixtures and wall-mounted emergency lights

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper floor, the character explores a narrow corridor with damaged walls and multiple doorways. An open bathroom with orange tiles is visible to the left. The character continues down the hallway, passing under flickering lights and examining the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark basement-like corridor with support pillars

events.description: character draws a handgun and holds it ready while advancing cautiously
slowing approach toward a closed door at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: holding a handgun with both hands and advancing slowly through the dark corridor toward a closed door

entered.detail: thick concrete structural columns in a dark open area
closed wooden door with a small window panel at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The atmosphere shifts to high tension as the character draws a handgun and advances cautiously through a dark corridor with concrete support pillars. The flashlight beam sweeps across the walls as the character approaches a closed door at the end of the hallway, weapon ready.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a decaying apartment building that shifts from a domestic interior into a tense, claustrophobic corridor. It begins in a white tiled utility room before moving through a doorway into a dark living space where a static-filled television glows and dust sheets cover the furniture. As the character exits the apartment, the scene opens into a dim hallway passing a reception desk and phone booth, eventually transitioning into a concrete stairwell where natural light filters through vine-overgrown windows. The camera then follows the ascent to an upper floor, gliding past damaged walls and an orange-tiled bathroom under flickering lights. Finally, the atmosphere tightens as the character draws a handgun and advances cautiously through a dark corridor of concrete pillars toward a closed door.
